steps.title: Locate Adrastea in the passage
steps.content: The passage states: "scientists used the Voyager 1 space probe to discover Adrastea in 1979." That single sentence gives the discovery year directly.

steps.title: Match the year to each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — '1979': the passage explicitly states Adrastea was discovered in 1979 by the Voyager 1 probe. ✓
  • Choice B — '1892': this year does not appear anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — '2001': this year does not appear anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — '1610': this is the year Galileo discovered Io, not Adrastea. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
